mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, role, status, favorites_count, likes_count, following_count, followers_count, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_user (username, password, email, role, status, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_user WHERE status = 'active'
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id = CAST(#{keyword} AS UNSIGNED))
